round_start_chat: &aThe round begins! Attackers, steal the relics!
team_assign_attacker: &fYou are an &6Attacker&f! Steal the 2 enemy relics.
relic_stolen_subtitle: &fBring it back to the deposit zone!
relic_dropped_chat: &c[Death] &e%s &6has been eliminated! Relic %d is on the ground — defenders can retrieve it!
relic_returned_chat: &2[Defense] A defender returned Relic %d to base!
relic_carrier_teammate: &cThis relic is already being carried by a teammate!
relic_in_hand: &eRelic %d in hand! Run to your base!
timer_auto_start: &b[Ops Orbis] A player has joined! Automatic start in %d s...
match_start_cancelled: &c[Ops Orbis] No more players, start cancelled.
match_stopped_admin: &c=== THE GAME HAS BEEN STOPPED BY AN ADMIN ===
player_reconnect_success: &aWelcome back! You have rejoined the ongoing game.
player_grace_expired: &cGrace period expired. You have been removed from the game.
cmd_not_joined: &cYou haven't joined the match yet! Use &e/oorbis join
cmd_kit_invalid: &cInvalid kit or not allowed for your role.
cmd_only_player: This command is for players only.
cmd_kit_not_compatible: &cThe &6%s &ckit is not available for the &6%s &crole. Change roles with &e/oorbis role <melee|distance>
